title: Professional Projects
subtitle: Enterprise-grade solutions demonstrating backend expertise, microservices architecture, and full-stack development proficiency.

urlShortener.title: Distributed URL Shortener
urlShortener.description: High-performance URL shortening service with analytics dashboard.
urlShortener.longDesc: Designed high-performance API handling 1M+ redirects with <50ms latency. Reduced database load by 80% using Redis caching. Built analytics dashboard for click tracking and geo-analysis.

collabEditor.title: Real-Time Collaborative Code Editor
collabEditor.description: WebSocket-based collaborative coding platform with syntax highlighting.
collabEditor.longDesc: Implemented WebSocket-based real-time collaboration for 100+ concurrent users. Developed synchronized editing and live update features with operational transformation for conflict resolution.

resumeAnalyzer.title: AI Resume Analyzer & Job Matcher
resumeAnalyzer.description: NLP-powered resume analysis and job recommendation system.
resumeAnalyzer.longDesc: Developed FastAPI backend for asynchronous PDF processing and semantic analysis using NLP APIs. Built interactive dashboard using Next.js for resume insights and job matching.

microservicesEcom.title: Microservices E-Commerce Platform
microservicesEcom.description: Scalable e-commerce platform with microservices architecture.
microservicesEcom.longDesc: Designed microservices architecture with asynchronous communication using RabbitMQ. Developed REST APIs for product catalog, cart, and order management. Deployed containerized services using Docker and Kubernetes on AWS.

ecommerce.title: E-Commerce Platform
ecommerce.description: Full-stack e-commerce solution with payment integration, real-time inventory, and analytics dashboard.
ecommerce.longDesc: Built a scalable e-commerce platform handling 1000+ daily users. Implemented secure payment processing with Stripe & Razorpay, real-time inventory management, and comprehensive sales analytics dashboard with predictive insights.

iot.title: IoT Data Monitoring System
iot.description: Real-time IoT device monitoring and analytics platform for industrial applications.
iot.longDesc: Developed a scalable system to collect, process, and visualize data from 1000+ IoT devices in real-time. Built custom WebSocket APIs for device communication, implemented anomaly detection algorithms, and created interactive monitoring dashboards.

pos.title: POS Billing System
pos.description: Enterprise retail management system with inventory tracking and advanced analytics.
pos.longDesc: Created a comprehensive POS system for retail chains featuring inventory management, automated billing, dynamic tax calculation, discount processing, supplier management, and detailed sales reports with predictive restocking alerts.

analytics.title: Sales Analytics Dashboard
analytics.description: Enterprise-grade BI dashboard for sales performance tracking and forecasting.
analytics.longDesc: Designed and implemented a comprehensive sales analytics dashboard integrating multiple data sources (SQL, Excel, APIs). Features include real-time KPI tracking, predictive analytics using ML models, custom report generation, and automated insight delivery.

mobile.title: Mobile Payment Application
mobile.description: Cross-platform mobile application with secure in-app payments and real-time sync.
mobile.longDesc: Built a Flutter-based mobile application for Android/iOS with integrated payment processing (Stripe, Razorpay), biometric authentication, real-time data synchronization using Firebase, and offline-first architecture for seamless user experience.

employee.title: Employee Management System
employee.description: Comprehensive HR management platform with role-based access and payroll integration.
employee.longDesc: Developed a full-featured employee management system featuring secure CRUD operations, role-based access control (RBAC), attendance tracking, payroll integration, performance review workflows, and automated report generation.

realestate.title: Real Estate Listing Platform
realestate.description: Property management and listing platform with advanced search and virtual tours.
realestate.longDesc: Built a real estate platform featuring property listings, advanced search filters, interactive maps, virtual tour integration, agent dashboards, lead management, and automated email notifications.

task.title: Task Management Application
task.description: Productivity-focused mobile app with task organization and team collaboration.
task.longDesc: Designed a cross-platform task management application supporting task creation, categorization, priority setting, deadline tracking, team collaboration features, real-time updates, and offline data persistence with cloud sync.

cta.title: Interested in collaborating?
cta.description: I'm currently available for freelance opportunities and full-time positions.
